name: Manufacturing Bill-of-Materials & Quality
nameZh: 制造业物料清单与质量

objects.name: Part
objects.description: A manufactured or purchased item identified by part_number, carrying its currently effective revision, safety classification, and inspection requirement; SAP ECC MARA/MARC master.
objects.descriptionZh: 由 part_number 标识的制造或采购物料，携带当前生效修订、安全分级与检验要求；SAP ECC MARA/MARC 主数据。
objects.relationship_description: BillOfMaterials includes Part. BillOfMaterials assembles Part. EngineeringChange affects Part. WorkOrder produces Part. Supplier supplies Part. InspectionLot inspects Part. NonConformance affects Part.

properties.name: make_or_buy
properties.description: Buy parts link to a Supplier.

sources.snippet: ### 2.1 `Part` (零件) — SAP ECC `MARA`/`MARC`

objects.name: BillOfMaterials
objects.description: The revisioned component structure of an assembled Part, with an effectivity window and a component list; SAP ECC STKO/STPO.
objects.descriptionZh: 已装配零件的修订化组件结构，含生效期窗口与组件清单；SAP ECC STKO/STPO。
objects.relationship_description: BillOfMaterials includes Part. BillOfMaterials assembles Part. EngineeringChange produces BillOfMaterials. WorkOrder built to BillOfMaterials. BillOfMaterials.parent_part_number references Part.

sources.snippet: ### 2.2 `BillOfMaterials` (物料清单) — SAP ECC `STKO`/`STPO`

objects.name: EngineeringChange
objects.description: A governed request to change product structure, moving Draft -> Classified -> Approved/Rejected -> Released; Jira ECR record.
objects.descriptionZh: 对产品结构的受控变更请求，状态为草稿->已分类->已批准/已拒绝->已发布；Jira ECR 记录。
objects.relationship_description: EngineeringChange affects Part. EngineeringChange produces BillOfMaterials.

sources.snippet: ### 2.3 `EngineeringChange` (工程变更) — Jira ECR

objects.name: WorkOrder
objects.description: A shop-floor order to build a parent Part against a frozen BOM revision, progressing Created -> Released -> InProcess -> Closed (or Blocked); SAP ECC AUFK/AFKO.
objects.descriptionZh: 依冻结的清单修订生产母件的车间工单，状态为已创建->已下达->进行中->已关闭（或已冻结）；SAP ECC AUFK/AFKO。
objects.relationship_description: WorkOrder built to BillOfMaterials. WorkOrder produces Part. InspectionLot against WorkOrder. WorkOrder.parent_part_number references Part. WorkOrder.bom_id references BillOfMaterials.

properties.name: bom_id
properties.description: FK -> BillOfMaterials.bom_id. Revision frozen at release per [R-09].

sources.snippet: ### 2.4 `WorkOrder` (生产工单) — SAP ECC `AUFK`/`AFKO`

objects.name: Supplier
objects.description: A vendor of purchased Parts, carrying a qualification status and a rolling 90-day rejection rate; SAP ECC LFA1.
objects.descriptionZh: 外购零件的供应商，携带资格状态与滚动 90 天拒收率；SAP ECC LFA1。
objects.relationship_description: Supplier supplies Part. Supplier responsible for NonConformance.

sources.snippet: ### 2.5 `Supplier` (供应商) — SAP ECC `LFA1`

objects.name: InspectionLot
objects.description: A quality lot opened against a finished or incoming Part lot, carrying a sampling plan and a usage-decision status; SAP ECC QALS.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对成品或来料零件批开立的质量批，携带抽样计划与使用决策状态；SAP ECC QALS。
objects.relationship_description: InspectionLot inspects Part. InspectionLot against WorkOrder. Inspection records InspectionLot. InspectionLot.part_number references Part. InspectionLot.work_order_id references WorkOrder. InspectionLot.supplier_id references Supplier.

properties.name: work_order_id
properties.description: FK -> WorkOrder. Null for incoming inspection.

properties.name: supplier_id
properties.description: FK -> Supplier. Set for incoming inspection.

sources.snippet: ### 2.6 `InspectionLot` (检验批) — SAP ECC `QALS`

objects.name: Inspection
objects.description: The recorded result of measuring an InspectionLot's characteristics, with a defect count and an aggregate Pass/Fail; immutable once posted; Quality Data Mart.
objects.descriptionZh: 对检验批特性测量后的结果记录，含缺陷数与汇总合格/不合格；过账后不可更改；质量数据集市。
objects.relationship_description: Inspection records InspectionLot. Inspection.lot_id references InspectionLot.

sources.snippet: ### 2.7 `Inspection` (检验记录) — Quality Data Mart

objects.name: NonConformance
objects.description: A quality defect record opened on a rejected lot, carrying severity, owner, and status Open -> Assigned -> Dispositioned -> Closed; Quality Data Mart.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对拒收批开立的质量缺陷记录，携带严重度、负责人及状态：开立->已分派->已处置->已关闭；质量数据集市。
objects.relationship_description: NonConformance affects Part. NonConformance resolved by Disposition. CorrectiveAction resolves NonConformance. Supplier responsible for NonConformance. NonConformance.part_number references Part. NonConformance.lot_id references InspectionLot. NonConformance.supplier_id references Supplier.

sources.snippet: ### 2.8 `NonConformance` (不合格品) — Quality Data Mart

objects.name: Disposition
objects.description: The decision on how to handle a nonconforming lot — UseAsIs, Rework, ReturnToSupplier, Quarantine, or Scrap — with optional QM sign-off; Quality Data Mart.
objects.descriptionZh: 对不合格批的处置决定——照用、返工、退供应商、隔离或报废——并视需要由质量经理签核；质量数据集市。
objects.relationship_description: NonConformance resolved by Disposition. Disposition.ncr_id references NonConformance.

sources.snippet: ### 2.9 `Disposition` (处置) — Quality Data Mart

objects.name: CorrectiveAction
objects.description: A CAPA opened from a disposition and root-cause analysis, with a due date and verification gate; must be verified effective before its NonConformance can close; Quality Data Mart.
objects.descriptionZh: 由处置与根因分析开立的纠正措施(CAPA)，含到期日与验证关卡；其不合格品关闭前必须验证有效；质量数据集市。
objects.relationship_description: CorrectiveAction resolves NonConformance. CorrectiveAction.ncr_id references NonConformance.

sources.snippet: ### 2.10 `CorrectiveAction` (纠正措施) — Quality Data Mart
`components` | list of {`part_number` (FK → `Part`), `quantity`, `component_revision`}
`parent_part_number` | string (FK → `Part.part_number`) | The assembled `Part`.
`affected_parts` | list (FK → `Part.part_number`)

label.zh: 工程变更产出物料清单修订

sources.snippet: **INT-1: ECR Release Sync** | Jira ECR → SAP ECC | `EngineeringChange`, new `BillOfMaterials` revision
`bom_id` | string (FK → `BillOfMaterials.bom_id`) | Revision frozen at release per `[R-09]`.
`parent_part_number` | string (FK → `Part`)
`make_or_buy` | enum(`Make`,`Buy`) | Buy parts link to a `Supplier`.
`part_number` | string (FK → `Part`)
`work_order_id` | string / null (FK → `WorkOrder`) | Null for incoming inspection.
`lot_id` | string (FK → `InspectionLot`)
`part_number` | string (FK → `Part`)
`ncr_id` | string (FK → `NonConformance`)

label.zh: 纠正措施纠正不合格品

sources.snippet: `ncr_id` | string (FK → `NonConformance`)
`supplier_id` | string / null (FK → `Supplier`)

rules.title: WorkOrder release requires effective revisions
rules.titleZh: 工单下达要求生效修订

statement.en: A WorkOrder may not be released unless every component Part in its BillOfMaterials is at the currently effective revision.
statement.zh: 除非其物料清单中的每个组件零件均处于当前生效修订，否则不得下达生产工单。

rules.formal: release(WorkOrder) -> all(c in WorkOrder.bom.components: c.revision = Part(c).revision_effective)

sources.snippet: **[R-01]** A `WorkOrder` **may not be released** unless every component `Part` in its `BillOfMaterials` is at the currently effective `revision`.

rules.title: Quarantine disposition blocks release
rules.titleZh: 隔离处置阻止下达

statement.en: A component Part that has an open NonConformance with Disposition = Quarantine shall not be consumed by any newly released WorkOrder.
statement.zh: 存在处置为隔离的开立不合格品的组件零件，不得被任何新下达的生产工单消耗。

rules.formal: Disposition(Part) = Quarantine -> forbid consume(Part) by released WorkOrder

sources.snippet: **[R-02]** A component `Part` that has an open `NonConformance` with `Disposition = Quarantine` **shall not** be consumed by any newly released `WorkOrder`.

rules.title: Safety changes need second approval
rules.titleZh: 安全变更需二次批准

statement.en: Any EngineeringChange that affects a Part whose safety_class is Critical is required to obtain a second engineer's approval before it may be released.
statement.zh: 任何影响 safety_class 为 Critical 零件的工程变更，在发布前必须取得第二位工程师的批准。

rules.formal: EngineeringChange.affects(Part.safety_class = Critical) -> count(approver_ids) >= 2 before status = Released

sources.snippet: **[R-03]** Any `EngineeringChange` that affects a `Part` whose `safety_class` is `Critical` **is required to** obtain a second engineer's approval before it may be released.

rules.title: No ship until lot accepted; reject opens NCR
rules.titleZh: 检验合格前不得发运；拒收开立不合格品

statement.en: A finished lot may not ship until its InspectionLot is Accepted; a Rejected InspectionLot shall automatically open a NonConformance.
statement.zh: 成品批在其检验批被接受前不得发运；被拒收的检验批应自动开立不合格品。

rules.formal: ship(Lot) -> InspectionLot(Lot).status = Accepted; InspectionLot.status = Rejected -> open(NonConformance)

sources.snippet: **[R-04]** A finished lot **may not ship** until its `InspectionLot` is `Accepted`; a `Rejected` `InspectionLot` **shall** automatically open a `NonConformance`.

rules.title: CCB quorum of three
rules.titleZh: 变更委员会法定人数为三

statement.en: An EngineeringChange must be approved by a Change Control Board quorum of at least three voting members before it moves to status Approved.
statement.zh: 工程变更在转为已批准状态前，须经变更控制委员会至少三名表决成员的法定批准。

rules.formal: EngineeringChange.status = Approved -> count(approver_ids) >= 3

sources.snippet: **[R-05]** An `EngineeringChange` **must** be approved by a Change Control Board quorum of at least three voting members before it moves to status `Approved`.

rules.title: BOM effectivity lead time
rules.titleZh: 物料清单生效提前期

statement.en: A BillOfMaterials revision shall carry an effective_from date no fewer than 5 business days in the future, except that an EngineeringChange flagged emergency = true may be made effective immediately with VP of Quality approval.
statement.zh: 物料清单修订的 effective_from 日期不得少于未来 5 个工作日，但标记 emergency = true 的工程变更经质量副总裁批准可立即生效。

rules.formal: BillOfMaterials.effective_from >= today + 5 business days OR (EngineeringChange.emergency = true AND vp_quality_approved)

sources.snippet: **[R-06]** A `BillOfMaterials` revision **shall** carry an `effective_from` date no fewer than 5 business days in the future, except that an `EngineeringChange` flagged `emergency = true` **may** be made effective immediately with VP of Quality approval.

rules.title: InspectionLot required when flagged
rules.titleZh: 需检验时必开检验批

statement.en: An InspectionLot is required for every finished lot of any Part whose inspection_required flag is true.
statement.zh: 对 inspection_required 标志为真的任何零件的每个成品批，均需开立检验批。

rules.formal: Part.inspection_required = true -> exists InspectionLot for finished lot

sources.snippet: **[R-07]** An `InspectionLot` **is required** for every finished lot of any `Part` whose `inspection_required` flag is true.

rules.title: AQL acceptance number
rules.titleZh: AQL 接收数

statement.en: An InspectionLot shall be set to Accepted only when the observed defect count is at or below the AQL 1.0 acceptance number for the applicable sample size; otherwise it must be set to Rejected.
statement.zh: 检验批仅在观察缺陷数不超过适用样本量的 AQL 1.0 接收数时方可置为接受，否则须置为拒收。

rules.formal: InspectionLot.status = Accepted iff Inspection.defect_count <= AQL_1.0_Ac(sample_size) else Rejected

sources.snippet: **[R-08]** An `InspectionLot` **shall** be set to `Accepted` only when the observed defect count is at or below the AQL 1.0 acceptance number for the applicable sample size; otherwise it **must** be set to `Rejected`.

rules.title: Backflush against frozen revision
rules.titleZh: 按冻结修订倒冲

statement.en: Every component goods issue must be backflushed against the bom_revision recorded on the released WorkOrder, and may not be backflushed against a later revision.
statement.zh: 每次组件发料必须按已下达工单上记录的 bom_revision 倒冲，且不得按更晚修订倒冲。

rules.formal: goods_issue.backflush_revision = WorkOrder.bom_revision (NOT latest)

sources.snippet: **[R-09]** Every component goods issue **must** be backflushed against the `bom_revision` recorded on the released `WorkOrder`, and **may not** be backflushed against a later revision.

rules.title: Receive only from approved suppliers
rules.titleZh: 仅从合格供应商收货

statement.en: Goods may be received only from a Supplier whose qualification_status is Approved.
statement.zh: 仅可从 qualification_status 为 Approved 的供应商收货。

rules.formal: receive(goods) -> Supplier.qualification_status = Approved

sources.snippet: **[R-10]** Goods **may** be received only from a `Supplier` whose `qualification_status` is `Approved`.

rules.title: Rejection-rate auto re-qualification
rules.titleZh: 拒收率自动再资格化

statement.en: A Supplier whose incoming-lot rejection rate exceeds 2% over any rolling 90-day window shall be automatically flagged for re-qualification.
statement.zh: 在任何滚动 90 天窗口内来料批拒收率超过 2% 的供应商，应被自动标记为需再资格化。

rules.formal: Supplier.rejection_rate_90d > 0.02 -> flag(Supplier, requalification)

sources.snippet: **[R-11]** A `Supplier` whose incoming-lot rejection rate exceeds 2% over any rolling 90-day window **shall** be automatically flagged for re-qualification.

rules.title: NCR owner within 24h
rules.titleZh: 不合格品 24 小时内指派负责人

statement.en: A NonConformance must be assigned an owner within 24 hours of being opened.
statement.zh: 不合格品须在开立后 24 小时内指派负责人。

rules.formal: now - NonConformance.opened_at <= 24h -> NonConformance.owner_id != null

sources.snippet: **[R-12]** A `NonConformance` **must** be assigned an owner within 24 hours of being opened.

rules.title: QM sign-off for UseAsIs/Rework on safety parts
rules.titleZh: 安全零件照用/返工需质量经理签核

statement.en: A Disposition of UseAsIs or Rework on a Part whose safety_class is Critical is required to carry Quality Manager sign-off.
statement.zh: 对 safety_class 为 Critical 零件作出照用或返工处置时，须由质量经理签核。

rules.formal: Disposition.decision in {UseAsIs, Rework} AND Part.safety_class = Critical -> Disposition.approved_by = QualityManager

sources.snippet: **[R-13]** A `Disposition` of `UseAsIs` or `Rework` on a `Part` whose `safety_class` is `Critical` **is required to** carry Quality Manager sign-off.

rules.title: Recurring NCR triggers CAPA
rules.titleZh: 重复不合格触发纠正措施

statement.en: A NonConformance that recurs three or more times within any 90-day window for the same Part shall trigger a formal CorrectiveAction (CAPA).
statement.zh: 同一零件在任何 90 天窗口内重复出现三次或以上的不合格品，应触发正式纠正措施(CAPA)。

rules.formal: count(NonConformance for Part in 90d) >= 3 -> require CorrectiveAction

sources.snippet: **[R-14]** A `NonConformance` that recurs three or more times within any 90-day window for the same `Part` **shall** trigger a formal `CorrectiveAction` (CAPA).

rules.title: Safety NCR escalation within 4h
rules.titleZh: 安全不合格品 4 小时内升级

statement.en: A NonConformance involving a Part whose safety_class is Critical must be escalated to the Quality Manager within 4 hours of being opened.
statement.zh: 涉及 safety_class 为 Critical 零件的不合格品，须在开立后 4 小时内升级至质量经理。

rules.formal: Part.safety_class = Critical -> escalate(NonConformance, QualityManager) within 4h of opened_at

sources.snippet: **[R-15]** A `NonConformance` involving a `Part` whose `safety_class` is `Critical` **must** be escalated to the Quality Manager within 4 hours of being opened.

rules.title: No WorkOrder close with open lot
rules.titleZh: 存在未结检验批不得关闭工单

statement.en: A WorkOrder may not be closed while any linked InspectionLot remains in status Open or InProcess.
statement.zh: 当任何关联检验批仍处于开立或进行中状态时，不得关闭生产工单。

rules.formal: close(WorkOrder) -> no linked InspectionLot.status in {Open, InProcess}

sources.snippet: **[R-16]** A `WorkOrder` **may not** be closed while any linked `InspectionLot` remains in status `Open` or `InProcess`.

rules.title: Inspection immutable after posting
rules.titleZh: 检验过账后不可更改

statement.en: An Inspection record may not be edited after its InspectionLot usage decision has been posted; corrections shall be made through a new, linked Inspection.
statement.zh: 检验记录在其检验批使用决策过账后不得修改；更正须通过新的关联检验记录进行。

rules.formal: Inspection.posted = true -> immutable(Inspection); correction -> new linked Inspection

sources.snippet: **[R-17]** An `Inspection` record **may not** be edited after its `InspectionLot` usage decision has been posted; corrections **shall** be made through a new, linked `Inspection`.

rules.title: CAPA verified before NCR close
rules.titleZh: 纠正措施验证后方可关闭不合格品

statement.en: A CorrectiveAction must be verified effective before its linked NonConformance may be set to status Closed.
statement.zh: 纠正措施须经验证有效，其关联不合格品方可置为已关闭状态。

rules.formal: NonConformance.status = Closed -> CorrectiveAction.verified_effective = true

sources.snippet: **[R-18]** A `CorrectiveAction` **must** be verified effective before its linked `NonConformance` **may** be set to status `Closed`.

rules.title: Only Quality Engineer posts Disposition
rules.titleZh: 仅质量工程师可过账处置

statement.en: Only a Quality Engineer or higher is authorized to post a Disposition; a Quality Inspector may not post a Disposition.
statement.zh: 仅质量工程师或更高级别有权过账处置；质量检验员不得过账处置。

rules.formal: post(Disposition) -> actor.role >= QualityEngineer; actor.role = QualityInspector -> forbid

sources.snippet: **[R-19]** Only a Quality Engineer or higher **is authorized to** post a `Disposition`; a Quality Inspector **may not** post a `Disposition`.

rules.title: No customer ship with unresolved Major/Critical NCR
rules.titleZh: 存在未解决重大/严重不合格不得发运客户

statement.en: A Part may not be released to a customer-facing shipment if any of its constituent component lots has an unresolved NonConformance with severity Major or Critical.
statement.zh: 若零件的任何组成组件批存在严重度为 Major 或 Critical 的未解决不合格品，则该零件不得发往面向客户的发运。

rules.formal: release_to_customer(Part) -> not exists component lot with NonConformance.severity in {Major, Critical} unresolved

sources.snippet: **[R-20]** A `Part` **may not** be released to a customer-facing shipment if any of its constituent component lots has an unresolved `NonConformance` with severity `Major` or `Critical`.

ruleGroups.rationale: Section A of POL-QMS-08: controls on revision effectivity and the engineering-change gate.
Section B of POL-QMS-08: build, backflush, inspection and lot-closure controls.
Section C of POL-QMS-08: supplier qualification and scorecard controls.

title.zh: 不合格与纠正措施规则

ruleGroups.rationale: Section D of POL-QMS-08: NCR triage, disposition sign-off, escalation and CAPA gating.
Section E of POL-QMS-08: record immutability, disposition authorization and customer-ship eligibility.

actions.name: RaiseEngineeringChange
actions.description: Create a new EngineeringChange record in status Draft from the proposed change description and affected Part numbers.
actions.descriptionZh: 根据提议的变更说明与受影响零件号，创建状态为草稿的新工程变更记录。

outputs.name: engineering_change
outputs.description: New EngineeringChange in status Draft with a unique ecr_id.

text.en: Capture the proposed change description and affected Part numbers.
text.zh: 捕获提议的变更说明与受影响零件号。

text.en: Create a new EngineeringChange in status Draft with a unique ecr_id.
text.zh: 创建状态为草稿、具有唯一 ecr_id 的新工程变更。

sideEffects.description: Insert EngineeringChange record in Jira ECR.

agent.toolDescription: Create a new EngineeringChange in Draft status from a proposed change.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `RaiseEngineeringChange`** — consumes the proposed change description and the list of affected `Part` numbers; produces a new `EngineeringChange` record in status `Draft` with a unique `ecr_id`.

actions.name: ClassifyEngineeringChange
actions.description: Classify the change category (Minor/Major/Safety) and set requires_second_approval when any affected Part is safety-critical per R-03.
actions.descriptionZh: 对变更类别（次要/重大/安全）进行分类，并在任一受影响零件为安全关键时按 R-03 设置需二次批准。

text.en: Read the affected Part safety_class master data.
text.zh: 读取受影响零件的 safety_class 主数据。

text.en: Set category (Minor/Major/Safety) and requires_second_approval per R-03 when any affected Part.safety_class = Critical.
text.zh: 当任一受影响 Part.safety_class = Critical 时，按 R-03 设置类别与需二次批准。

agent.toolDescription: Classify a change and flag second-approval need for safety-critical parts.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `ClassifyEngineeringChange`** — consumes the affected `Part` master data; produces the change `category` (Minor / Major / Safety) and sets `requires_second_approval` per **[R-03]** when any affected `Part.safety_class = Critical`.

actions.name: ApproveEngineeringChange
actions.description: Review the EngineeringChange at the CCB and produce an approval decision; enforces CCB quorum (R-05) and second-engineer approval for safety changes (R-03).
actions.descriptionZh: 在变更控制委员会审查工程变更并产出批准决定；执行委员会法定人数(R-05)及安全变更的第二工程师批准(R-03)。

text.en: Collect CCB votes and verify a quorum of at least three voting members per R-05.
text.zh: 收集委员会投票并按 R-05 核验至少三名表决成员的法定人数。

text.en: For a Safety-classified change, verify a second engineer's approval per R-03 before release.
text.zh: 对安全分类变更，发布前按 R-03 核验第二位工程师的批准。

text.en: Set EngineeringChange.status to Approved or Rejected.
text.zh: 将工程变更状态置为已批准或已拒绝。

agent.toolDescription: Record the CCB approval decision with quorum and safety-approval checks.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `ApproveEngineeringChange`** — consumes the `EngineeringChange` package and CCB votes; produces an approval decision. Per **[R-03]**, a Safety-classified change requires a **second engineer's approval** before it may be released; per **[R-05]** the CCB quorum is at least three voting members.

actions.name: SetRevisionEffectivity
actions.description: Produce a new effective BillOfMaterials revision and bump each affected Part.revision; enforces the effective_from lead time per R-06.
actions.descriptionZh: 产出新的生效物料清单修订并提升每个受影响 Part.revision；按 R-06 执行生效起始日提前期。

text.en: Create a new BillOfMaterials revision with an effective_from date at least 5 business days out per R-06 (unless emergency).
text.zh: 按 R-06 创建生效起始日至少未来 5 个工作日的新物料清单修订（紧急情形除外）。

text.en: Bump each affected Part.revision and set EngineeringChange.status to Released.
text.zh: 提升每个受影响 Part.revision 并将工程变更状态置为已发布。

sideEffects.description: Part.revision bumped; BOM revision made effective.

agent.toolDescription: Publish a new effective BOM revision and bump affected part revisions.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `SetRevisionEffectivity`** — consumes the approved `EngineeringChange`; produces a new effective `BillOfMaterials` revision and bumps each affected `Part.revision`. Per **[R-06]** the `effective_from` date must be at least the configured lead time (default 5 business days) in the future unless an emergency change is flagged.

actions.name: RevalidateOpenWorkOrders
actions.description: Evaluate all open WorkOrders referencing an affected Part and produce a hold flag on any still pointing at a superseded revision per R-01.
actions.descriptionZh: 评估所有引用受影响零件的开放工单，对仍指向被替代修订者按 R-01 产出冻结标记。

text.en: Find all open WorkOrders that reference an affected Part.
text.zh: 查找所有引用受影响零件的开放工单。

text.en: Flag any WorkOrder still pointing at a superseded revision per R-01.
text.zh: 按 R-01 标记仍指向被替代修订的任何工单。

agent.toolDescription: Flag open work orders pointing at superseded BOM revisions.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `RevalidateOpenWorkOrders`** — consumes all open `WorkOrder` records that reference an affected `Part`; produces a hold flag on any `WorkOrder` still pointing at a superseded revision per **[R-01]**.

actions.name: ReleaseWorkOrder
actions.description: Release a WorkOrder with reserved components against the currently effective BillOfMaterials; blocked unless all components are at effective revision (R-01) and none carry a Quarantine NonConformance (R-02).
actions.descriptionZh: 依当前生效物料清单下达带预留组件的工单；除非所有组件均为生效修订(R-01)且无隔离不合格(R-02)，否则阻止。

text.en: Verify every component Part is at the currently effective revision per R-01.
text.zh: 按 R-01 核验每个组件零件均为当前生效修订。

text.en: Verify no component Part carries an open NonConformance with Disposition = Quarantine per R-02.
text.zh: 按 R-02 核验无组件零件存在处置为隔离的开立不合格品。

text.en: Release the WorkOrder and reserve components.
text.zh: 下达工单并预留组件。

agent.toolDescription: Release a work order against the effective BOM with rule gating.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `ReleaseWorkOrder`** — consumes the demand (planned order) and the **currently effective** `BillOfMaterials`; produces a released `WorkOrder` with reserved components. Per **[R-01]**, a `WorkOrder` **may not be released** unless every component `Part` in its `BillOfMaterials` is at the currently effective `revision`. Per **[R-02]**, release is blocked if any component `Part` carries an open `NonConformance` with disposition `Quarantine`.

actions.name: ConfirmProductionOperation
actions.description: Confirm operation yield from issued components and, at the final operation, produce a finished Part lot pending inspection; backflushes against the released WorkOrder BOM revision per R-09.
actions.descriptionZh: 依已发料组件确认操作产出，并在最终操作产出待检成品零件批；按 R-09 依已下达工单的物料清单修订倒冲。

outputs.name: finished_part_lot
outputs.description: Finished Part lot pending inspection at the final operation.

text.en: Backflush every component goods issue against the released WorkOrder bom_revision per R-09.
text.zh: 按 R-09 依已下达工单 bom_revision 倒冲每次组件发料。

text.en: Confirm operation yield; at the final operation, produce a finished Part lot pending inspection.
text.zh: 确认操作产出；在最终操作产出待检成品零件批。

agent.toolDescription: Confirm an operation and backflush against the frozen BOM revision.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `ConfirmProductionOperation`** — consumes issued component `Part` quantities; produces confirmed operation yield and, at the final operation, a finished `Part` lot pending inspection. Per **[R-09]** every goods issue must be backflushed against the released `WorkOrder` BOM revision, not the latest revision.

actions.name: OpenInspectionLot
actions.description: Create a new InspectionLot in status Open with a sampling plan; mandatory for any finished lot of a Part whose inspection_required is true per R-07.
actions.descriptionZh: 创建带抽样计划、状态为开立的新检验批；按 R-07 对 inspection_required 为真零件的任何成品批为强制。

inputs.name: inspection_plan
inputs.description: The inspection plan for that Part.

outputs.name: inspection_lot
outputs.description: New InspectionLot in status Open with sampling plan.

text.en: Check the Part inspection_required flag per R-07.
text.zh: 按 R-07 检查零件 inspection_required 标志。

text.en: Create a new InspectionLot in status Open with a sampling plan.
text.zh: 创建带抽样计划、状态为开立的新检验批。

sideEffects.description: Create InspectionLot in SAP ECC QM.

agent.toolDescription: Open an inspection lot with a sampling plan for a finished lot.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `OpenInspectionLot`** — consumes the `FinishedLotProduced` event and the inspection plan for that `Part`; produces a new `InspectionLot` in status `Open` with a sampling plan. Per **[R-07]** an `InspectionLot` is mandatory for any finished lot of a `Part` whose `inspection_required` flag is true.

actions.name: RecordInspection
actions.description: Produce an Inspection record with pass/fail per characteristic and an aggregate result; the lot is Accepted only if defects are at or below the AQL acceptance number per R-08. Used for both finished-lot and incoming inspection.
actions.descriptionZh: 产出含各特性合格/不合格及汇总结果的检验记录；仅当缺陷数不超过 AQL 接收数时该批方为接受(R-08)。用于成品批与来料检验。

inputs.name: measured_characteristics
inputs.description: The sampling plan and measured characteristics.

outputs.name: inspection
outputs.description: Inspection record with per-characteristic and aggregate result.

text.en: Measure characteristics against the sampling plan.
text.zh: 依抽样计划测量特性。

text.en: Set the lot Accepted only if defect count is at or below the AQL acceptance number; otherwise Rejected, per R-08.
text.zh: 按 R-08，仅当缺陷数不超过 AQL 接收数时置批为接受，否则拒收。

sideEffects.description: Write Inspection result in Quality Data Mart.

agent.toolDescription: Record inspection results and compute AQL acceptance.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `RecordInspection`** — consumes the sampling plan and measured characteristics; produces an `Inspection` record with pass/fail per characteristic and an aggregate result. Per **[R-08]** the lot is `Accepted` only if the number of defects is at or below the AQL acceptance number for the sample size; otherwise it is `Rejected`.

actions.name: PostUsageDecision
actions.description: On Accepted, post the lot to unrestricted stock and clear it to ship per R-04; on Rejected, automatically open a NonConformance per R-04 and post to blocked stock.
actions.descriptionZh: 接受时按 R-04 将批过账至非限制库存并放行发运；拒收时按 R-04 自动开立不合格品并过账至冻结库存。

text.en: On Accepted, post the lot to unrestricted stock and clear to ship per R-04.
text.zh: 接受时按 R-04 将批过账至非限制库存并放行发运。

text.en: On Rejected, automatically open a NonConformance per R-04 and post to blocked stock.
text.zh: 拒收时按 R-04 自动开立不合格品并过账至冻结库存。

sideEffects.description: InspectionLot.status posted; stock moved; NCR opened on reject.

agent.toolDescription: Post the usage decision; open an NCR automatically on rejection.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `PostUsageDecision`** — consumes the `Inspection` result; on `Accepted`, posts the lot to unrestricted stock and clears it to ship per **[R-04]**; on `Rejected`, **automatically opens a `NonConformance`** per **[R-04]** and posts the lot to blocked stock.

actions.name: ReleaseLotToShip
actions.description: Produce a delivery-eligible lot from an accepted finished lot; a finished lot may not ship until its InspectionLot is Accepted per R-04.
actions.descriptionZh: 由已接受成品批产出可交付批；成品批在其检验批被接受前不得发运(R-04)。

text.en: Verify the InspectionLot is Accepted before shipping per R-04.
text.zh: 按 R-04 在发运前核验检验批为已接受。

text.en: Verify no constituent component lot has an unresolved Major/Critical NonConformance per R-20.
text.zh: 按 R-20 核验无组成组件批存在未解决的重大/严重不合格品。

text.en: Produce a delivery-eligible lot and close the WorkOrder.
text.zh: 产出可交付批并关闭工单。

agent.toolDescription: Release an accepted lot to ship and close the work order.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `ReleaseLotToShip`** — consumes the accepted finished lot; produces a delivery-eligible lot. Per **[R-04]** a finished lot **may not ship** until its `InspectionLot` is `Accepted`.

actions.name: PostGoodsReceipt
actions.description: Produce a received Part lot in quality-inspection stock and, for inspection-required parts, an incoming InspectionLot; goods may be received only from an Approved Supplier per R-10.
actions.descriptionZh: 产出处于质检库存的收货零件批，并对需检验零件产出来料检验批；按 R-10 仅可从合格供应商收货。

inputs.name: inbound_delivery
inputs.description: The inbound delivery against a purchase order.

text.en: Verify the Supplier qualification_status is Approved per R-10.
text.zh: 按 R-10 核验供应商 qualification_status 为合格。

text.en: Post the received Part lot to quality-inspection stock and open an incoming InspectionLot for inspection-required parts.
text.zh: 将收货零件批过账至质检库存，并为需检验零件开立来料检验批。

sideEffects.description: Post goods receipt; open incoming inspection lot.

agent.toolDescription: Post a goods receipt from an approved supplier and open incoming inspection.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `PostGoodsReceipt`** — consumes the inbound delivery against a purchase order; produces a received `Part` lot in quality-inspection stock and, for inspection-required parts, an incoming `InspectionLot`. Per **[R-10]** goods may be received only from a `Supplier` whose `qualification_status = Approved`.

actions.name: TriageNonConformance
actions.description: Produce an owner assignment and severity for an auto-opened NonConformance; an owner must be assigned within 24h (R-12) and a safety-critical Part NCR escalated to the Quality Manager within 4h (R-15).
actions.descriptionZh: 为自动开立的不合格品产出负责人指派与严重度；须在 24 小时内指派负责人(R-12)，安全关键零件不合格须在 4 小时内升级至质量经理(R-15)。

text.en: Assign an owner within 24 hours of opening per R-12.
text.zh: 按 R-12 在开立后 24 小时内指派负责人。

text.en: Escalate a safety-classified Part nonconformance to the Quality Manager within 4 hours per R-15.
text.zh: 按 R-15 在 4 小时内将安全分类零件不合格升级至质量经理。

agent.toolDescription: Assign owner and severity; escalate safety NCRs.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `TriageNonConformance`** — consumes the auto-opened `NonConformance`; produces an owner assignment and severity. Per **[R-12]** a `NonConformance` must be assigned an owner within 24 hours of opening; per **[R-15]** a safety-classified `Part` nonconformance must be escalated to the Quality Manager within 4 hours.

actions.name: DispositionNonConformance
actions.description: Produce a Disposition of UseAsIs, Rework, ReturnToSupplier, Quarantine, or Scrap; UseAsIs/Rework on a safety-critical Part requires QM sign-off (R-13) and a Quarantine blocks new WorkOrder release (R-02); only a Quality Engineer or higher may post it (R-19).
actions.descriptionZh: 产出照用、返工、退供应商、隔离或报废处置；安全关键零件照用/返工需质量经理签核(R-13)，隔离将阻止新工单下达(R-02)；仅质量工程师或更高级别可过账(R-19)。

text.en: Verify the actor is a Quality Engineer or higher per R-19.
text.zh: 按 R-19 核验执行人为质量工程师或更高级别。

text.en: For UseAsIs/Rework on a safety-critical Part, obtain Quality Manager sign-off per R-13.
text.zh: 对安全关键零件的照用/返工，按 R-13 取得质量经理签核。

text.en: Produce the Disposition; a Quarantine blocks the affected Part from new WorkOrder release per R-02.
text.zh: 产出处置；隔离将按 R-02 阻止受影响零件的新工单下达。

sideEffects.description: Create Disposition; move stock per decision.

agent.toolDescription: Post a disposition with authorization and QM sign-off gating.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `DispositionNonConformance`** — consumes the investigation findings; produces a `Disposition` of `UseAsIs`, `Rework`, `ReturnToSupplier`, `Quarantine`, or `Scrap`. Per **[R-13]** a `UseAsIs` or `Rework` disposition on a safety-classified `Part` requires Quality Manager sign-off; per **[R-02]** a `Quarantine` disposition blocks the affected `Part` from new `WorkOrder` release.

actions.name: OpenCorrectiveAction
actions.description: Produce a CorrectiveAction with a due date from the Disposition and root-cause analysis; a NonConformance recurring three or more times in 90 days for the same Part requires a formal CAPA (R-14), and a CAPA must be verified effective before its NonConformance may close (R-18).
actions.descriptionZh: 依处置与根因分析产出含到期日的纠正措施；同一零件 90 天内重复三次或以上的不合格品需正式 CAPA(R-14)，且 CAPA 须验证有效后其不合格品方可关闭(R-18)。

outputs.name: engineering_change
outputs.description: Optionally raised if the fix changes product structure.

text.en: If a NonConformance recurs three or more times within 90 days for the same Part, require a formal CorrectiveAction per R-14.
text.zh: 若同一零件 90 天内重复三次或以上，按 R-14 要求正式纠正措施。

text.en: Produce a CorrectiveAction with a due date; on verification, close it and the NonConformance per R-18.
text.zh: 产出含到期日的纠正措施；验证后按 R-18 关闭其与不合格品。

text.en: If the fix changes product structure, raise a new EngineeringChange (re-entering Process P1).
text.zh: 若修复改变产品结构，提出新工程变更（重入流程 P1）。

sideEffects.description: Create CorrectiveAction; close NCR on verification.

agent.toolDescription: Open a CAPA and close the NCR after effectiveness verification.

sources.snippet: **Action (动作): `OpenCorrectiveAction`** — consumes the `Disposition` and root-cause analysis; produces a `CorrectiveAction` with a due date. Per **[R-14]** any `NonConformance` recurring three or more times within 90 days for the same `Part` requires a formal `CorrectiveAction` (CAPA). If the fix changes product structure, a new `EngineeringChange` is raised (re-entering Process P1).

events.name: change.need.identified
events.description: A defect trend, customer request, or cost reduction surfaces a need to change product structure.
events.descriptionZh: 缺陷趋势、客户请求或成本降低暴露出更改产品结构的需求。

payload.name: trigger_source
payload.description: Defect trend, customer request, or cost reduction.

sources.snippet: **Triggering event (事件):** `ChangeNeedIdentified` (a defect trend, customer request, or cost reduction surfaces).

events.name: engineering.change.raised
events.description: A new EngineeringChange has been raised in Draft status.
events.descriptionZh: 已提出状态为草稿的新工程变更。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `EngineeringChangeRaised`.

events.name: engineering.change.classified
events.description: An EngineeringChange has been classified with a category and second-approval flag.

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `EngineeringChangeClassified`.

events.descriptionZh: 工程变更已经变更控制委员会批准。

events.description: An EngineeringChange has been rejected by the CCB.
events.descriptionZh: 工程变更已被变更控制委员会拒绝。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `EngineeringChangeApproved` (or `EngineeringChangeRejected`).

events.description: A BOM revision became effective on its effective_from date.
events.descriptionZh: 物料清单修订在其生效起始日生效。

sources.snippet: | `RevisionBecameEffective` | SAP ECC | SAP ECC (PP), MES | `part_number`, `revision` |

sources.snippet: | `BomRevisionPublished` | SAP ECC | Quality Data Mart, MES | `bom_id`, `bom_revision`, `effective_from` |

events.name: work.order.revalidation.required
events.description: An open WorkOrder still points at a superseded revision and must be revalidated.

events.name: production.demand.confirmed
events.description: A production demand (planned order) has been confirmed, triggering work-order release.
events.descriptionZh: 生产需求（计划订单）已确认，触发工单下达。

events.description: A NonConformance has been dispositioned with a decision.
events.descriptionZh: 不合格品已作出处置决定。

sources.snippet: | `NonConformanceDispositioned` | Quality Data Mart | SAP ECC | `ncr_id`, `disposition_id`, `decision` |

events.name: corrective.action.opened
events.description: A CorrectiveAction has been opened with a due date.
events.descriptionZh: 已开立含到期日的纠正措施。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `CorrectiveActionOpened`; on verification, `CorrectiveActionClosed` and `NonConformanceClosed`.

events.name: corrective.action.closed
events.description: A CorrectiveAction was verified effective and closed.
events.descriptionZh: 纠正措施经验证有效并关闭。

sources.snippet: | `CorrectiveActionClosed` | Quality Data Mart | Jira ECR (optional new ECR) | `capa_id`, `ncr_id` |

events.name: non.conformance.closed
events.description: A NonConformance was set to Closed after its CorrectiveAction was verified effective.
events.descriptionZh: 纠正措施验证有效后不合格品被置为已关闭。

events.name: supplier.delivery.arrived
events.description: A Supplier delivery has arrived against a purchase order.
events.descriptionZh: 供应商交货已按采购订单到达。

sources.snippet: **Triggering event (事件):** `SupplierDeliveryArrived`.

events.name: finished.lot.shippable
events.description: A finished lot is delivery-eligible after acceptance.
events.descriptionZh: 成品批在接受后可交付。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `FinishedLotShippable`.

events.name: goods.receipt.posted
events.description: A supplier goods receipt was posted to quality-inspection stock.
events.descriptionZh: 供应商收货已过账至质检库存。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event (事件):** `GoodsReceiptPosted`; for inspection-required parts, `InspectionLotOpened`.

processes.description: How a proposed change to product structure moves from request through review, approval, and revision effectivity so the shop floor builds only to the currently effective specification.

triggers.description: A defect trend, customer request, or cost reduction surfaces.

sources.snippet: - **Process P1 — Engineering Change to Effectivity (工程变更到生效):** how a proposed change to product structure moves from request through review, approval, and **revision effectivity** so the shop floor builds only to the currently effective specification.

processes.description: How a WorkOrder is released against an effective BillOfMaterials, built, inspected via an InspectionLot, and either released to stock/ship or routed into a NonConformance.

sources.snippet: - **Process P2 — Build to Inspection (生产到检验):** how a `WorkOrder` is released against an effective `BillOfMaterials`, built, inspected via an `InspectionLot`, and either released to stock/ship or routed into a `NonConformance`.

name.zh: 供应商资格与来料检验

processes.description: How a Supplier-provided Part lot is received and inspected before consumption.

sources.snippet: - **Process P3 — Supplier Qualification & Incoming Inspection (供应商资格与来料检验):** how a `Supplier`-provided `Part` lot is received and inspected before consumption.

name.zh: 不合格品处置与纠正措施

processes.description: How a NonConformance is investigated, dispositioned, and closed.

sources.snippet: - **Process P4 — Nonconformance Disposition & CAPA (不合格品处置与纠正措施):** how a `NonConformance` is investigated, dispositioned, and closed.

stageCritiques.objects: 10 entity object types extracted from §2 of ARCH-DATA-12; primary keys, FK references (refObjectTypeId) and enum vocabularies (enumValues) grounded in the attribute tables; foreign keys carry keyRole 'fk' and a refObjectTypeId.
stageCritiques.rules: All 20 atomic rules R-01..R-20 mined sentence-by-sentence from POL-QMS-08 with sentenceRefs, clustered into 5 groups matching policy Sections A-E; severities mapped from modal verbs (may not/shall not/must -> block; auto-flag/within-24h/recurrence -> warn).
stageCritiques.actions: 15 actions span P1 change-to-effectivity (5), P2 build-to-inspection (6 incl. shared RecordInspection/PostUsageDecision), P3 incoming inspection (PostGoodsReceipt + reuse), and P4 NCR/CAPA (3); each carries a typed I/O signature, rule-gated steps, preconditions, an AgentBinding tool, and triggeredBy/emits events.
stageCritiques.events: 26 events; system-table and emitted events extracted from ARCH-DATA-12 §4 and the SOP step emissions, intra-process triggers (ChangeNeedIdentified, ProductionDemandConfirmed, SupplierDeliveryArrived) inferred with derivedFrom; producedByActionIds/consumedByActionIds maintained as the exact inverse of action emitsEvents/triggeredByEventIds.
stageCritiques.processes: 4 end-to-end processes (P1-P4) chain the actions with event-driven edges; P4 may re-enter P1 via a new EngineeringChange when a CAPA changes product structure (callsActionTypeId on the CAPA step).
